title: olea capensis subsp. enervis
intro: Olea capensis subsp. enervis, also known as the hardy olive or rock olive, is a shrub-like plant species native to the mountainous regions of southern Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Olea capensis subsp. enervis include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as possessing antioxidant and antimicrobial properties that can help protect against infections and diseases. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
